chunks.title: Sons of Israel and Judah
chunks.reason: Lists the twelve sons of Jacob and details the specific lineage of Judah.

chunks.title: Lineage of Perez to David
chunks.reason: Traces the family line from Perez through Hezron and Ram down to King David.

chunks.title: Descendants of Caleb and Hezron
chunks.reason: Details the offspring of Caleb and the later generations of Hezron's family.

chunks.title: Lineage of Jerahmeel
chunks.reason: Provides a catalog of the sons and grandsons of Jerahmeel.

chunks.title: Lineage of Sheshan
chunks.reason: Records the descendants of Sheshan through his Egyptian slave Jarha.

chunks.title: Sons and Concubines of Caleb
chunks.reason: Lists the children of Caleb including his concubines and the descendants of Hur.

chunks.title: Families of Kiriath-jearim and Jabez
chunks.reason: Catalogs the families associated with specific cities and the Kenites.
